name: wangsu-label-ip
description: OctoBus package for Wangsu Spider label IP batch forbid and unforbid operations.

Wangsu_LabelIP.WangsuLabelIPService/Batc.name: batch-forbid-ip
Wangsu_LabelIP.WangsuLabelIPService/Batc.description: Batch add IP addresses to a Wangsu Spider label forbid list.

Wangsu_LabelIP.WangsuLabelIPService/Batc.name: batch-unforbid-ip
Wangsu_LabelIP.WangsuLabelIPService/Batc.description: Batch remove IP addresses from a Wangsu Spider label forbid list.
